[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00010100 2
7 01010101 4

01 00010101 3
12 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5

34 01010000 2

70 00100000 1

73 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
